qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_especialidad as oi_especialidad, t0.c_especialidad as c_especialidad, t0.d_especialidad as d_especialidad, SEC.policy, t0.c_especialidad as CODE, t0.d_especialidad as TEXT FROM MED01_ESPECIALIDAD as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.MedicinaLaboral.Especialidades.ESPECIALIDAD\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_especialidad LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_especialidad asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_especialidad as oi_especialidad, SEC.policy FROM MED01_ESPECIALIDAD as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.MedicinaLaboral.Especialidades.ESPECIALIDAD\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_especialidad LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_especialidad asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.MedicinaLaboral.Especialidades.ESPECIALIDAD.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.MedicinaLaboral.Especialidades.ESPECIALIDAD.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(MED01_ESPECIALIDAD.oi_especialidad) as CNT from MED01_ESPECIALIDAD Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and MED01_ESPECIALIDAD.oi_especialidad={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(MED01_ESPECIALIDAD.d_especialidad,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(MED01_ESPECIALIDAD.c_especialidad,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW
